$comment: SAI agent registry. One entry per initialized agent (Phase 6 of .ai/INITIALIZE.md). Fields: agent_id (charter prefix + unique suffix), name (granted by principal - never self-chosen), role_title (granted by principal), purpose (one paragraph, confirmed by the principal in Phase 6 - the agent sticks to it), folder (repo-relative agent profile path), charter (repo-relative path under _roles/), principal (human the agent works under), status (provisional until named, then active; retired when decommissioned), initialized (UTC date), automation (either the real Cursor automation name+schedule+creation date, or 'delegated: <spec path> (awaiting creation by <principal>)' - 'unavailable' is not allowed and the verifier rejects it; active agents must also have name, role_title, and purpose), notes.

agents.purpose: Proposed, pending dezocode's confirmation: bootstrap and maintain the SAI coordinated agent infrastructure (.ai workspace, hooks, reporting, CI enforcement) under the CEO charter until a named successor or role change is granted.
agents.notes: Bootstrap agent that built the framework (PR #3). Acting under the CEO charter until dezocode grants a name and role title per Phase 6; naming request posted in initialization/handoff reports.
